steps.prompt: Doctors and nurses use special words! Find nurse and trace it!
steps.feedback: Nurse! A nurse helps people feel better. Find pill!
Pill! A small medicine that helps you get well. Find plaster!
Plaster! Goes on a cut to help it heal. Last one — find bandage!
Bandage! Wraps around a hurt part to protect it. nurse, pill, plaster, bandage — you know the doctor words!
